failed_rules.message: LoanType must be Closed End Second for 2nd Lien program
Combined Loan-to-Value 80% exceeds maximum 75% for DSCR Investment: FICO Score 720+, up to $350K
US Citizens are not eligible for Select ITIN program.
Occupancy 'Investment Property' not eligible. Available: Primary Residence
Super Jumbo program only available for Primary (Owner Occupied) occupancy - Non-Owner Occupied not eligible
Loan-to-Value 80% exceeds matrix limit 70% for FICO Score 800, Investment Property, $168,000, DSCR 1.25
US Citizens are not eligible for Foreign National program - FAIL
DSCR income documentation is not eligible for Flex Select — use a DSCR program (e.g. DSCR Supreme, Investor DSCR) - FAIL
DSCR income documentation is not eligible for Flex Supreme — use a DSCR program (e.g. DSCR Supreme, Investor DSCR) - FAIL
DSCR Multi (5-8 Units): Only Residential 5-8 Units and Mixed Use 2-8 Units are eligible
Loan-to-Value 80% exceeds maximum 75% for FICO Score 740, Loan up to $1M: 75% Purchase/R&T, 65% Cash-Out
DSCR tier "DSCR > 1.15%" is too high - No Ratio program requires DSCR < 0.75 - FAIL

specifications: Must be a tri-merge or Residential Mortgage Credit Report (RMCR) from all 3 major bureaus (Experian, TransUnion, Equifax)
Must include all borrowers on the loan
Must show credit scores from all reporting bureaus
Must include complete tradeline details with payment history
Must show mortgage payment history for any existing mortgages
Must include inquiries within past 90-120 days
Must show public records, disputes, collections, and charge-offs
Must certify results of public record searches for each city where borrower resided in last 2 years
Must verify all credit references provided on loan application
Must include valid SSN verification
Must be dated within 90 days of closing
reasons_needed: Credit score is required to validate DSCR program eligibility and pricing tier
Tri-merge report required per NQMF guidelines for all borrowers on loan
Tradeline and credit history requirements must be reviewed for eligibility
Credit report needed to identify any credit events, housing events, inquiries, or disputes
Public record search required for cities of residence in last 2 years per guidelines
Mortgage payment history visible on credit report satisfies housing history requirement

specifications: Must be current and unexpired government-issued photo identification (driver's license, passport, or state ID)
Must display borrower's full legal name matching loan application
Must include photograph, date of birth, and signature
Must be legible with all four corners visible

reasons_needed.reason: Borrower identity must be verified to validate all loan documents and authorizations
Required for Patriot Act/CIP compliance and borrower authentication

specifications: Must be fully executed with borrower signature and date
Must include correct borrower SSN and address history for applicable tax years
Must authorize release of tax transcripts for most recent 1-2 tax years as required by program
Must list correct lender/servicer information as transcript recipient

reasons_needed.reason: Tax transcript authorization required per NQMF guidelines for income verification
Enables IRS tax return transcript retrieval to validate declared income

specifications: Must certify property will be held as investment/non-owner occupied
Must include borrower signature and date
Must confirm borrower does not intend to occupy the property as primary residence or second home
Must acknowledge investment property pricing and terms apply

reasons_needed.reason: Investment property occupancy must be certified to confirm eligibility for Investor DSCR program
Occupancy type drives LTV limits, reserve requirements, and pricing tier

specifications: Must be fully executed with all signatures from buyer and seller
Must include subject property address matching loan application
Must show purchase price of $210,000 consistent with 80% LTV and $168,000 loan amount
Must include closing date, earnest money deposit amount, and any seller concessions
Must include all addenda and amendments

reasons_needed.reason: Purchase transaction requires executed contract to validate purchase price, terms, and parties
Contract needed to confirm arm's length transaction and identify any interested party contributions

document_requests.document_type: Borrower Certification as to Business Purpose
specifications: Must identify borrower Emmanuel Nyarko
Must identify subject investment property in Tennessee
Must state that the loan is for business/investment purpose only and is a non-TRID transaction
Must confirm property will NOT be occupied by borrower, any member of borrower's LLC, or any family member
Must be signed and dated by all borrowers
Must be consistent with Investment/NOO occupancy designation on 1003
Also referred to as 'Business Purpose & Occupancy Affidavit' per NQM guidelines
reasons_needed: DSCR loans are required to be Business Purpose and processed as non-TRID transactions per NQM guidelines
Business Purpose & Occupancy Affidavit is required on ALL Business Purpose loans per guidelines
Confirms borrower declaration that property is for commercial business or investment purpose only
Required to validate non-owner-occupied investment status and compliance with Business Purpose loan requirements
document_requests.source_guideline: INVESTMENT PROPERTY & BUSINESS PURPOSE LOANS - 'Business Purpose & Occupancy Affidavit is required on all Business Purpose loans'
document_requests.triggered_by: DSCR investor program requires business purpose designation per NQM guidelines

specifications: Must cover 12-month lookback period for all existing mortgages
Must identify borrower name and property address for each mortgage
Must show payment due dates and payment received dates
Must indicate any late payments (30/60/90/120 days)
Must be from mortgage servicer statements or credit report mortgage tradeline detail
Must include account numbers and current balances
reasons_needed: Housing payment history required for DSCR program eligibility
Late mortgage payments affect qualification and pricing adjustments
Mortgage history establishes borrower payment pattern on investment properties
Required to verify no 1x120 housing event which would trigger additional seasoning requirements
conditions: Only required if borrower has existing mortgages - verify from credit report tradelines
source_guidelines: NQMF Housing Events and Prior Bankruptcy

specifications: Must be completed on FNMA Form 1007 Single Family Comparable Rent Schedule
Must identify the subject property address matching the loan file
Must include appraiser's opinion of market rent
Must include comparable rental properties to support market rent determination
For purchase transaction, market rent from 1007 will be used for DSCR calculation
If property is tenant occupied, must reflect terms of current lease
Must be completed by appraiser as part of appraisal package
Must identify subject property address
Must show market rent for subject property
Must include comparable rental data to support market rent conclusion
Must align with DSCR ratio calculation using gross rental income
Must reflect terms of current lease if property is tenant-occupied at time of appraisal
reasons_needed: DSCR ratio calculation requires gross rental income documented via Form 1007 for purchase transactions
Investor DSCR program uses 75% of appraiser's opinion of market rent for qualifying
Market rent must be established to calculate DSCR ratio = Gross Rental Income / PITIA
Required for all 1-unit Investment Properties per FNMA Form 1007 guidelines
DSCR ratio calculation requires gross rental income documentation
Market rent support required for DSCR program qualification
Investor DSCR program requires rental income analysis for collateral support
document_requests.guideline_reference: DSCR RATIO section - For all purchase transactions, gross market rents from the 1007/1025 will be used

specifications: Must provide rent loss/rental income insurance coverage for the subject property
Coverage must equal at least 6 months of PITIA (Principal, Interest, Taxes, Insurance, Association dues)
Must name the subject property address
Blanket policies covering the subject property are acceptable
Evidence of policy required at closing
Must provide hazard insurance protecting against fire and extended coverage perils
Extended coverage must include wind, civil commotion, smoke, hail, aircraft, vehicle, and explosion
Coverage must be on replacement cost basis (actual cash value not acceptable)
Must name all persons holding title as named insured
Must include standard mortgagee clause naming NQM Funding LLC
Policy must be effective for at least 60 days after funding date
Must show policy number, coverage amounts, deductible, premium, and effective dates
Must show property address matching loan file
Evidence may be policy, Certificate of Insurance, or insurance binder
Must provide rent loss coverage for subject property
Coverage must equal at least 6 months of PITIA
Blanket policies covering the subject property are eligible
Must identify subject property address
Must show coverage amount, policy number, and effective dates
reasons_needed: DSCR program requires rent loss insurance coverage equal to at least 6 months of PITIA
Protects lender against loss of rental income during vacancy or tenant default
Required per Investor DSCR program guidelines unless waiver applies per program matrix
Hazard insurance required on all properties to protect collateral
Coverage ensures protection of lender's collateral interest
Mortgagee clause required for lender protection
Investment property requires adequate coverage for collateral protection
Required for all DSCR loans per Investor DSCR program guidelines
Protects rental income stream for investment property collateral
DSCR program matrix requires rent loss insurance unless waiver option exercised
document_requests.guideline_reference: RENT LOSS INSURANCE (DSCR) - Rent Loss Insurance for the subject property is required and must equal at least 6 months of PITIA

specifications: Must provide most recent 2 consecutive months of statements
Must include all pages of each statement
Must show borrower name as account holder
Must show financial institution name and logo
Must show account number (full or masked)
Must show beginning and ending balances for each statement period
Must show complete transaction history
Must be dated within 90 days of note date
Must show sufficient funds to cover down payment, closing costs, prepaid items, and required reserves
Any deposits exceeding 50% of qualifying income or unusual deposits must be identifiable
Must document minimum required reserve months per DSCR program matrix
Investment property typically requires 6 months PITIA reserves
Reserves must be in liquid, accessible accounts (checking, savings, money market)
Reserve assets must be shown on bank statements dated within 90 days of note date
Must calculate PITIA (Principal, Interest, Taxes, Insurance, Association dues) for reserve determination
Reserves must be separate from and in addition to funds required for closing
reasons_needed: Assets must be verified for funds to close per NQMF guidelines
Account ownership must be confirmed to borrower
Sufficient funds must be documented for 20% down payment ($42,000 based on $210,000 purchase price at 80% LTV)
Reserves must be supported by verified liquid assets
Large deposits may require sourcing documentation if identified
DSCR investment property loans require reserve verification
Reserves provide risk mitigation for non-owner occupied properties
Program matrix specifies reserve requirements based on LTV, property type, and loan amount
Reserves must be documented as remaining after funds to close
document_requests.guideline_reference: NQMF Guidelines - ASSETS: Loan files must evidence sufficient funds from acceptable sources for down payment, closing costs, prepaid items, debt payoff, and applicable reserves

specifications: Must provide copy of cancelled EMD check (front and back) OR wire transfer confirmation
Must show EMD amount matches purchase contract
Must show funds originated from borrower's verified account
Must include bank statement showing withdrawal of EMD funds
If EMD paid by check, must show check has cleared borrower's account
Must show payee as escrow/title company or seller as indicated in purchase contract
reasons_needed: Purchase transaction requires verification of earnest money deposit
EMD funds must be sourced to borrower's verified assets
EMD amount applies toward funds to close calculation
Documentation creates audit trail for down payment sourcing
document_requests.guideline_reference: NQMF Guidelines - ASSETS: Funds must be verified from acceptable sources for down payment

specifications: Must be completed on FNMA Form 1004 (Uniform Residential Appraisal Report) for single-family residence
Must identify subject property address matching loan file
Must identify property type as Single Family Residence and confirm unit count
Must show appraised value to support LTV/CLTV calculation at 80%
Must be dated within 120 days of Note date (or within 365 days with recertification)
Must include all pages, addenda, and appraiser certification
Must include interior and exterior photographs including front, rear, street view, kitchen, bathrooms, and main living areas
Must include street map showing subject and all comparables used
Must include exterior building sketch with dimensions and floor plan with GLA calculation
Must confirm property condition rating of C4 or better (C5/C6 not acceptable for DSCR)
Must confirm property is free of deferred maintenance as required for DSCR properties
Must confirm no health or safety issues or structural deficiencies
Must confirm property contains full kitchen and bathroom
Must confirm minimum 400 square feet
Must include analysis of comparable sales and market value support
Must disclose any repairs, adverse conditions, or inspection requirements
Must include Form 1007 Single Family Comparable Rent Schedule for investment property rental income support
reasons_needed: Collateral valuation is required for underwriting all loan transactions
LTV/CLTV eligibility at 80% depends on appraised value confirmation
Property type and condition affect DSCR program eligibility
DSCR properties must be free of deferred maintenance per guidelines
Property condition C4 requires additional evaluation for marketability on DSCR loans
Form 1007 rent schedule required for all 1-unit Investment Properties per NQMF guidelines
Subject property identity must be consistent across the loan file

specifications: Must include Submission Summary Report (SSR) from UCDP
SSR Score must be 2.5 or less for acceptance
Must be associated with the subject appraisal report
Must identify any flags or warnings requiring resolution
reasons_needed: Appraisal Review Process requires secondary appraisal product to support value
FNMA SSR Score of 2.5 or less required per NQMF appraisal review guidelines
Standard collateral validation required for underwriting

specifications: Must be a FEMA Flood Certificate establishing flood zone status
Must identify subject property address
Must clearly indicate flood zone designation
Must indicate whether property is in Special Flood Hazard Area (SFHA) Zone A or V
Must indicate whether community participates in NFIP program if in SFHA
reasons_needed: Required for all loan transactions to determine flood insurance requirements
Properties in Flood Zone A or V require flood insurance
Properties in SFHA must be in NFIP-participating community for eligibility
Flood zone determination affects insurance requirements and loan eligibility

specifications: Must identify borrower Emmanuel Nyarko as proposed insured/buyer
Must identify subject property address and full legal description
Must disclose all liens, judgments, easements, exceptions, and title requirements
Must show title insurer name, commitment number, and effective date
Must include 24-month chain of title history with transfer dates, prices, buyer/seller names
Must confirm proposed first lien position for NQM Funding
Title insurer must be licensed and authorized in Tennessee
Must be dated within acceptable recency window (typically 30-60 days of closing)
reasons_needed: Title must confirm clear ownership and insurable interest in the subject property
24-month chain of title required per guidelines to review for flipping activity or inconsistencies
All liens and exceptions must be reviewed to ensure first lien position without exception
Adverse credit impacting title must be identified and resolved prior to closing
Title commitment confirms property can be insured under acceptable ALTA policy form
document_requests.applicable_conditions: All purchase transactions require title commitment review

specifications: Must show current seller/owner name(s) as grantor
Must show legal description matching title commitment and appraisal
Must show subject property address
Must be recorded document or copy from title company
Vesting must reconcile with purchase contract seller information
reasons_needed: Confirms current ownership of property and seller's authority to convey
Legal description must match across all loan documents for clear title
Vesting review required to identify any ownership inconsistencies
Required to verify seller on purchase contract has legal right to sell the property
document_requests.applicable_conditions: Purchase transaction - deed confirms seller ownership

specifications: Must identify subject property address
Must identify tenant name(s)
Must show lease term start and end dates
Must show monthly rent amount
Must be executed/signed by tenant and landlord
If property is tenant-occupied at time of purchase, lease is required
For purchase of vacant property, lease may be provided if tenant secured before closing
reasons_needed: Per DSCR guidelines, if property is currently tenant occupied, the 1007/1025 must reflect the terms of the lease
Lease agreement supports rental income when property is leased
Lease terms must be verified to ensure property is not occupied by borrower, borrower's LLC members, or family members
document_requests.guideline_reference: DSCR RATIO section - If the property is currently tenant occupied, the 1007/1025 must reflect the terms of the current lease
document_requests.condition_note: Required if property is or will be tenant-occupied; for vacant purchase property, acceptable to proceed without lease

specifications: Must be FNMA Form 3170 (Assignment of Rents)
Must be executed by all borrowers
Must identify subject property address
Must assign rental income rights to lender as additional security
reasons_needed: Required for all Investment Properties per NQMF appraisal requirements
Provides lender with security interest in rental income
Standard collateral documentation for investment property loans
